rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee labels and eq/const declarations for AGREE syntax
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) in generated contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
